items.title: Pakistan launches strikes on Afghanistan, with Taliban saying dozens killed
items.dek: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

items.title: More than 1,500 Venezuelan political prisoners apply for amnesty
items.dek: The announcement by the head of Venezuela's National Assembly comes amid US pressure following the capture of ex-President Nicolás Maduro.
